text.title: Solo Late-Fee Clause Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping jurisdiction allowance + SOW presence + days-overdue to invoke / pause / escalate.

decision-tree.root-question: jurisdiction allows late fees AND review memo within 12 months?

conclusion.verdict: defer; obtain local-lawyer memo OR use dunning sequence only
reject invocation; add clause to next signed SOW; cannot enforce email-only mention
no fee yet; send standard dunning sequence (sibling methodology)
apply tier 1 fee (e.g., 1.5%/mo); send pause notification at day 14 with 5-business-day notice
pause work; apply tier 2+; require re_engagement_fee paid in advance to resume

text.example: US-CA → memo fresh → SOW signed v3 → days_overdue=22 → apply 1.5%/mo + pause notification sent at day 14.
